member.name: T:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics
member.summary: MvLogisticsSDK

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_OK
member.summary: ch:成功, 无错误 | en:Successed, no error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_HANDLE
member.summary: ch:错误或无效的句柄 | en:Error or invalid handle

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_SUPPORT
member.summary: ch:不支持的功能 | en:The function is not supported

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_BUFOVER
member.summary: ch:缓存已满 | en:Buffer is full

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_CALLORDER
member.summary: ch:函数调用顺序错误 | en:Incorrect calling sequence

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_PARAMETER
member.summary: ch:错误的参数 | en:Incorrect parameter

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_RESOURCE
member.summary: ch:资源申请失败 | en:Applying resource failed

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_NODATA
member.summary: ch:无数据 | en:No data

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_PRECONDITION
member.summary: ch:前置条件有误，或运行环境已发生变化 | en:Precondition error, or running environment changed

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_ENCRYPT
member.summary: ch:凭证错误，可能是未插加密狗，或加密狗过期 | en:Credential error, possibly because the dongle was not installed or expired

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_RULE
member.summary: ch:过滤规则相关的错误 | en:Filter rule error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_JPGENC
member.summary: ch:jpg编码相关错误 | en:Jpg encoding error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_IMAGE
member.summary: ch:输入的图像数据有损或图像格式,宽高错误 | en:Abnormal image. Incomplete image caused by packet loss or incorrect image format, width, or height

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_CONFIG
member.summary: ch:配置文件有误 | en:Config file error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_UNKNOW
member.summary: ch:未知的错误 | en:Unknown error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_CAMERA
member.summary: ch:相机相关的错误 | en:Camera error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_BCR
member.summary: ch:一维码相关错误 | en:1D barcode error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_TDCR
member.summary: ch:二维码相关错误 | en:2D barcode error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_WAYBILL
member.summary: ch:抠图相关错误 | en:Matting error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_SCRIPT
member.summary: ch:脚本规则相关错误 | en:Script rule error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_GENERIC
member.summary: ch:通用错误 | en:General error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_ARGUMENT
member.summary: ch:参数非法 | en:Invalid parameter

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_RANGE
member.summary: ch:值超出范围 | en:The value is out of range

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_PROPERTY
member.summary: ch:属性错误 | en:Attribute error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_RUNTIME
member.summary: ch:运行环境有问题 | en:Running environment error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_LOGICAL
member.summary: ch:逻辑错误 | en:Incorrect logic

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_ACCESS
member.summary: ch:节点访问条件有误 | en:Node accessing condition error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_TIMEOUT
member.summary: ch:超时 | en:Timeout

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_DYNAMICCAST
member.summary: ch:转换异常 | en:Transformation exception

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_GC_UNKNOW
member.summary: ch:GenICam未知错误 | en:GenICam unknown error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_NOT_IMPLEMENTED
member.summary: ch:命令不被设备支持 | en:The command is not supported by device

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_INVALID_ADDRESS
member.summary: ch:访问的目标地址不存在 | en:Target address does not exist

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_WRITE_PROTECT
member.summary: ch:目标地址不可写 | en:The target address is not writable

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_ACCESS_DENIED
member.summary: ch:设备无访问权限 | en:No access permission

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_BUSY
member.summary: ch:设备忙，或网络断开 | en:Device is busy, or network is disconnected

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_PACKET
member.summary: ch:网络包数据错误 | en:Network packet error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_NETER
member.summary: ch:网络相关错误 | en:Network error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_IP_CONFLICT
member.summary: ch:设备IP冲突 | en:IP address conflicted

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_USB_READ
member.summary: ch:读usb出错 | en:USB read error

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_USB_WRITE
member.summary: ch:写usb出错 | en:USB write error

member.summary: ch:设备异常 | en:Device exception

member.summary: ch:GenICam相关错误 | en:GenICam error

member.summary: ch:带宽不足 该错误码新增 | en:Insufficient bandwidth, this error code is newly added

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_USB_DRIVER
member.summary: ch:驱动不匹配或者未装驱动 | en:Driver is mismatched, or is not installed

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_USB_UNKNOW
member.summary: ch:USB未知的错误 | en:USB unknown error

member.summary: ch:融合模块配置文件错误 | en:Fusion module configuration file error

member.summary: ch:融合模块未知错误 | en:Unknown error of fusion module

member.summary: ch:体积模块调用顺序错误 | en:Volume module calling sequence is wrong

member.summary: ch:称重模块称重设备打开失败 | en:Weighing module weighing equipment failed to open

member.summary: ch:称重模块加密错误 | en:Weighing module encryption error

member.summary: ch:称重模块资源初始化失败 | en:Weighing module resource initialization failed

member.summary: ch:称重模块调用顺序错误 | en:Weighing module call sequence error

member.summary: ch:称重模块指针类型参数为空 | en:Weighing module pointer type parameter is null

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MV_LGS_E_WGHT_RANGE
member.summary: ch:称重模块数值类型参数范围错误 | en:Weighing module numerical type parameter range error

member.summary: ch:称重模块能力集错误 | en:Weighing module capability set error

member.summary: ch:称重模块其他内部错误 | en:Weighing module other internal errors

member.summary: ch:设备重连成功 | en:The device is reconnect success

member.summary: ch:设备断开连接 | en:The device is disconnected

member.summary: ch:加密狗掉线 | en:The softdog is disconnected

member.param: ch:异常回调函数指针 | en:Exception Message CallBack Function Pointer
ch:用户自定义变量 | en:User defined variable

member.summary: ch:设置流水号 | en:Set Running Number
member.param: ch:流水号 | en:Running Number
ch:流水号和触发号绑定的时间区间 | en:The time interval of the serial number and the trigger number binding
member.returns: ch:成功, 返回MV_LGS_OK; 错误, 返回错误码 | en:Success, return MV_LGS_OK. Failure, return error code

member.summary: ch:条码信息 | en:Code information

member.summary: ch:字符 | en:Character, maximum size: 4096

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_CODE_INFO.nLen
member.summary: ch:字符长度 | en:Character size

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_CODE_INFO.enBarType
member.summary: ch:条码类型 | en:Bar code type

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_CODE_INFO.stCornerPt
member.summary: ch:条码位置 | en:Bar code location

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_CODE_INFO.nAngle
member.summary: ch:条码角度（0~3600） | en:Bar code angle, range: [0, 3600°]

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_CODE_INFO.nFilterFlag
member.summary: ch:过滤码标识(0为正常码, 1为过滤码) | en:Filter identifier: 0- normal code, 1-filter code

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_CODE_INFO.strSerialNumber
member.summary: ch:相机序列号 | en:Camera serial number

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_CODE_INFO.nReserved
member.summary: ch:保留 | en:Reserved

member.name: T:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO
member.summary: ch:包裹信息 | en:Package information

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.bCodeEnable
member.summary: ch:是否包含条码信息,非0：包含条码信息 | en:Whether to include barcode information, non-zero: contains barcode information

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.nCodeListNum
member.summary: ch:条码列表数量 | en:Number of barcode lists

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.stCodeList
member.summary: ch:条码列表信息 | en:Bar code list information

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.bVolumeEnable
member.summary: ch:是否包含体积信息,非0：包含体积信息 | en:Whether to include volume information, non-zero: contains volume information

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.stVolumeInfo
member.summary: ch:体积信息 | en:Volume information

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.bWeightEnable
member.summary: ch:是否包含重量信息,非0：包含重量信息 | en:Whether to include weight information, non-zero: contains weight information

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.fWeight
member.summary: ch:重量信息 | en:Weight information

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.bPRMEnable
member.summary: ch:是否包含全景图像,非0：包含全景图像 | en:Whether to include panoramic images, non-zero: include panoramic images

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.stPRMImage
member.summary: ch:原始图像信息 | en:Original image information

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.bIsFirstCodeOut
member.summary: ch:是否为条码先输出 (1为第一次输出，0为第二次输出) | en:Whether to output the barcode first (1 is the first output, 0 is the second output)

member.name: F:MvLogisticsSDKNet.MvLogistics.MVLGS_PACKAGE_INFO.llTriggerStartTimeStamp
member.summary: ch:触发开始时间戳(13位) | en:Trigger start timestamp (13 bits)

member.summary: ch:触发结束时间戳(13位) | en:Trigger end timestamp (13 bits)

member.summary: ch:保留 | en:Reserved

member.summary: ch:异常设备序列号(体积相机此处为MAC地址) | en:Abnormal device serial number (the volume camera here is the MAC address)

member.summary: ch:异常描述 | en:Exception description

member.summary: ch:保留 | en:Reserved

member.summary: ch:触发ID | en:Trigger ID

member.summary: ch:触发标识 与头文件触发开始为1(MV_LGS_BEGIN_TRIGGER) 触发结束为0(MV_LGS_STOP_TRIGGER) 对应映射| en:Trigger description

member.summary: ch:设备在线状态，true在线，false离线 | en:Device online status, true online, false offline
